---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## Get in Touch

**Lab:** Faculty of Sciences and Technology <br>
Tel-Hai University, Israel, 1220800

**Email:** [doronkam@telhai.ac.il](mailto:doronkam@telhai.ac.il)

For inquiries about joining the lab, please visit the [Open Positions](positions.qmd) page and use the subject-line format specified for each role.

## Location

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 1rem;">
<iframe
  src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Academic%20College%20of%20Tel-Hai%2C%20Eastern%20Campus&t=m&z=14&ie=UTF8&iwloc=&output=embed"
  width="100%"
  height="350"
  style="border:0; border-radius: 4px;"
  allowfullscreen=""
  loading="lazy"
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
</iframe>
</div>
```
